programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At a sprawling ranch in Texas, Mike eyes a Volkswagen bus that has been transformed into a hunting lodge on wheels while Frank finds a storied heirloom.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett Joyce faces trouble after winning a bid to transport a giant 40-foot colon. Meanwhile, Roy locks horns with the owner of a large video game.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Mark Bassett brings in a late 1800s railroad hand-car. Can Rick's skill transform this rusty wreck into a museum-quality marvel?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny customises a 1960s Chevrolet Camaro for a high-end client before joining Shannon in a search for a 1960s Ford Mustang and a 1960s Chevrolet Chevelle.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Disney hires an ingenious marketing executive who helps promote their characters to millions and leads to a lucrative licensing of Disney products.

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: The ride takes a dramatic turn when Bhaskar totals the support car. With Ridermania just days away, Jess and the team scramble to salvage their journey.

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Beat the Judges
programme.desc: Three skilled champions return for an opportunity to take down a judge but only two move forward to recreate an exquisite Falcata.

credits.actor: Wil Willis,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: A man uses his inner beast to scare a bear away, boaters try to escape an erupting volcano and a dust storm steals second base.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Bob Lazar talks about element 115 or Moscovium, an exotic heavy metal that could provide the key to humanity's future in the stars.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers visit picturesque destinations to experience local cuisines, discover unique attractions, and share valuable tips on the best places to eat and explore.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The presenter explores strange stories of humans with supernatural powers, including a visually impaired man with echolocation powers and a samurai with reflexes faster than a speeding bullet.

programme.title: Kumbh: Among the Seekers
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases the Kumbh Mela in India and shines a light on the many elements, both human and technical, that create this unique experience.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Rick negotiates with a BMX stunt rider who brings in his 1976 Evel Knievel Junior Roadmaster bike, offering a discount if the client gives a daring performance.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny Crossley faces transportation challenges at an El Monte auction caravan. Meanwhile, Rene and Casey find success with their storage unit.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Palm Springs to check out higher end goods. Meanwhile, Kenny amps up the profit on an unimpressive unit.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Tour D' Royale
programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The prodigal smiths of New Agrarian School in Bigfork, Montana are put to a gruelling challenge in order to prove their mettle and win a grand prize.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Shipping an iconic piece from a popular ghost movie has Roy at his wit's end. Meanwhile the Two Blondes take on a load of dinosaurs.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.desc: Kenny Crossley faces transportation challenges at an El Monte auction caravan. Meanwhile, Rene and Casey find success with their storage unit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets some of the most remarkable individuals of India like a football player with an incredible sense to balance stuff, an architect who builds houses from recycled paper and more.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Without humans, water becomes a destroyer that brings chaos, flooding cities, collapsing dams and awakening ancient forces that were previously contained.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Renowned actor and host Morgan Freeman revisits some of the most daring jailbreaks conducted by ingenuous prisoners from across the globe.

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: High up above the dangerous terrain of the Himalayas, an adventurous paraglider accidentally becomes entangled with a vulture, plummeting them both to the ground.

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the owner of 'Dunkin' Donuts' who reinvented the dessert and created 52 flavour, which gave his biggest rivals a run for their money.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A submarine car from the James Bond movie turns up in the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler negotiate a deal with an antique store.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Beat the Judges
programme.desc: Three skilled champions return for an opportunity to take down a judge but only two move forward to recreate an exquisite Falcata.

credits.actor: Wil Willis,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Take a look at an innovative robot that has excellent culinary skills. Also, meet Dattadri Kothur who found an eco-friendly solution to dispose Ganesha idols.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Palm Springs to check out higher end goods. Meanwhile, Kenny amps up the profit on an unimpressive unit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny revisits an old project, a 1967 Ford Bronco restoration that the shop must turn around quickly. Meanwhile, a client brings in a 1950 Harley Davidson.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Dan Aykroyd sheds light on shipwrecks, plane crashes and UFO sightings. Later, he explores the Lake Michigan Triangle, weird wilderness and other spooky places.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: A pair of brazen killers execute a daring breakout from Elmira State Prison when the convicts scale the towering forty-foot walls, fleeing via the rooftop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Rene's work day with his daughter turns into a wonderful beach trip, Kenny looks back into his childhood for profitable inspiration.

programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Secrets of Penthouse
programme.desc: As Penthouse enters the 2000s, the magazine is in deep trouble. With sales falling, the magazine loses major advertisers.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Nuno Pontes led six men out of the Pittsburgh State Penitentiary by tunneling under the prison wall. However, they were caught at Texas and sent back to the penal institution.

programme.desc: Shipping an iconic piece from a popular ghost movie has Roy at his wit's end. Meanwhile the Two Blondes take on a load of dinosaurs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: The crew works hard to restore a rare British 1950s Ariel Square-Four motorcycle. Meanwhile, Tyler helps Ron and Leonard sharpen their fork-lift skills.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly customises a Cadillac as part of a personal project. Inspired by this, Danny checks out a collection of Cadillacs while Paulie and Mike try to purchase a rare Chevrolet Camaro.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Small Budget Big Makeover
programme.desc: Muninder and Vishakha use their expert knowledge in order to give Kirti and her three children a unique house they can call their own.

programme.title: Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Two doctors, Ferdinand Recio and Nielsen Donato, study wildlife of the Philippines. They visit several places and check on various species.

programme.title: Tour D' Royale
programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Beat the Judges
programme.desc: Three skilled Forged in Fire Champions have to slash through level one to have a chance to rock out a nine-ringed broadsword.

credits.actor: Wil Willis,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: A seal discovers an eight-legged weapon, a dog comes to the rescue of a drowning deer and a town starts to crumble into the sea.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The filmmaker tries to understand if aliens from the tiny star like Sirius B visited humans in the distant past in order to impart the knowledge of civilisation.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: In the pink city of Jaipur, Samira visits a medieval fort, enjoys high tea with a local businessman and obtains Rajasthani royal recipes from the city's top chefs.

programme.title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
programme.desc: Described by the FBI as 'the best ever', a heist crew with mob connections takes down a California bank in 1972 and gets away with millions.

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: The filmmaker sets on a fast-paced journey to look into the pasts of legendary companies to fascinating subjects like UFOs and the daily lives of billionaires.

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: The host shows the making of foods that include sliced bread, baby carrots, apple juice, peanut butter and jelly sandwiches and twinkies.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Rene's work day with his daughter turns into a wonderful beach trip, Kenny looks back into his childhood for profitable inspiration.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: A competitor, when faced with the Viking Seax, tries to prove the curved Egyptian Khosephand can thrive in the obstacle course. Later, the two finalists compete in the Dead Run.

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: After a crash leaves Zombie injured, the crew scrambles to stay on schedule for Ridermania. Meanwhile, Jess is met with overwhelming support from fans and fellow riders at the festival.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: In the absence of humans, the deserts which were once subdued will return to reclaim great victories, from the shimmering lights of Las Vegas to the towering glory of Dubai's Burj Khalifa.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn's antique doll collection takes a turn when she discovers unexpected spiritual companions. Meanwhile, Dusty Davie encounters a Russian MiG fighter.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Rene's work day with his daughter turns into a wonderful beach trip, Kenny looks back into his childhood for profitable inspiration.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lancaster is Ivy's honeypot, while Lisa plans to use the right side of her brain when selecting lockers. Elsewhere, Dusty and Lupe do a mitzvah.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets Tanushree, a Guinness World Record holder. Remarkably, she astounds with 44 full-body revolutions in a chest stand within one minute, showcasing extraordinary flexibility and control.

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: An impala finds unlikely escape from a cheetah, a skier gets buried alive and a paraglider gets into a conflict with a kangaroo.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is blessed with the restorations of a 1970 Plymouth Road Runner and a 1970 Dodge Coronet. Meanwhile, Ryan and Mike plans in store for Roli.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the possibility that aliens might be the reason behind the process of evolution which could be achieved by introducing viruses into the human genetic material.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Discover the skilled smith who passes three gruelling challenges in order to win 20,000 dollars for themselves and $10,000 in forging equipment for their shop.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Rick negotiates with a BMX stunt rider who brings in his 1976 Evel Knievel Junior Roadmaster bike, offering a discount if the client gives a daring performance.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and his team tackle a 1960s Cadillac restoration, aiming to match its interior with a bold root beer paint job. Meanwhile, Jeff Blando seeks the final touches for his custom chopper.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Explore a house that was built in 21 days using recycled materials and mud. Also, meet a 72-year-old from Kerala who can drive anything with wheels, including bulldozers and cranes.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lancaster is Ivy's honeypot, while Lisa plans to use the right side of her brain when selecting lockers. Elsewhere, Dusty and Lupe do a mitzvah.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: When a California's strict collector faces pressure to slim his hoard, the men aid his downsizing effort. Later, a keen roadside hunch yields a trove of coveted vintage motors.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A submarine car from the James Bond movie turns up in the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler negotiate a deal with an antique store.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: While Alana explores the fresh products in a market in Vienna, Scotty tastes one of Broome's signature dishes. Elsewhere, Skye learns about Hahndorf's German heritage, before travelling to the Barossa Valley.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores some of the unusual causes of death including a lawnmower killing a football spectator, deadly beards and more.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While the Lord of Lancaster asserts his power, Lisa and Kerri sew vintage accessories. Elsewhere, Dusty and Lupe find gold in a huge storage unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dusty and his girlfriend find a huge stock of vintage television memorabilia. Meanwhile, Kenny is astonished when he comes across a remarkable music box.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programme.title: Leepu \u0026 Pitbull
programme.desc: Leepu and Pitbull put their skills to the test when they reform a beat-up 1981 Camaro. Further, when Leepu uses old-school methods, the crew doubts him.
